board.title: Which board are you studying?
board.description: This tailors your notes, papers and AI answers to the right syllabus.

medium.title: Pick your medium
medium.description: Your study material — notes, papers and flashcards — will be in this language.

class.title: What class are you in?
class.description: We'll load the right chapters and past papers for your class.

subjects.title: Choose your subjects
subjects.description: We've pre-selected the usual ones. Tap to adjust.
subjects.empty: No subjects available for this combination yet.

language.title: Interface language
language.description: The language of buttons and menus. Your study material stays in your chosen medium.
language.note: Study content follows your {medium} medium — only the app's interface changes here.

summary.title: All set — quick check
summary.description: Everything look right? You can change any of this later in settings.

done.title: You're all set, let's go!
done.description: Your workspace is personalised for {board} · {medium} · Class {class}.
